# CYDRUST OTA partition table (4 MB flas: # Used ONLY by the OTA build:  cargo +esp build --features wifi
# Enable via sdkconfig.defaults.ota (see notes in sdkconfig.defaults)
#   CONFIG_PARTITION_TABLE_CUSTOM=y
#   CONFIG_PARTITION_TABLE_CUSTOM_FILENAME="partitions_ota.csv"
# The default (USB / corporate) build keeps the built-in single-`factory`
# layout and does NOT use this file.
# Layout (bootloader @ 0x1000
#   nvs      24 KiB   WiFi calibration + our "vibe_set" settings namespace
#   otadata   8 KiB   which slot to boot (mirrored
#   phy_init  4 KiB   RF/PHY calibration (kept to mirror the default layout)
#   ota_0  1664 KiB   app slot A  (~800 KiB image fits with headroom)
#   ota_1  1664 KiB   app slot B
#  total used: 0x10000 + 2*0x1A0000 = 0x350000 (3.3 MiB) of the 4 MiB part.
# App partitions must be 0x10000-aligned; offsets below are auto-computed by
# leaving the Offset column blank where possible
# for clarity. Sizes can be grown later as long as the table stays <= 4 MiB.
# Name
nvs
otadata
phy_init
ota_0
ota_1
